lesson.title: Steaming Basics
lesson.description: Learn the technique of steaming, including the benefits and methods of steaming various ingredients.
steps: 1. Prepare your ingredients by cutting them into uniform pieces.
2. Fill a pot with water and bring it to a boil.
3. Place the ingredients in a steamer basket above the boiling water.
4. Cover and steam until the ingredients are tender.
safety: Be careful of the steam when lifting the lid.
Ensure the pot is stable and not boiling over.
milestones: Successfully steam vegetables without overcooking them.
